news.title: Bitcoin's $76,000 breakout fails but a rare signal is hinting at major market bottom
news.summary: Derivatives funding rates have now remained negative for 46 days, a streak last seen following the FTX crash which marked the bottom of 2022's crypto winter.

news.title: The next Fed chair has crypto exposure in his portfolio. Here are the details
news.summary: Kevin Warsh's financial disclosure reveals stakes in DeFi protocols, Ethereum scaling networks, a Bitcoin Lightning startup, and prediction markets — all of which he's promised to sell.

news.title: Rakuten to allow XRP to be used as payment method by its 44 million customers
news.summary: Rakuten Pay users will also be able to spot trade XRP via the Rakuten Pay app and exchange the Japanese e-commerce giant’s points to purchase Ripple’s token
